_comment: 分镜/翻译中间产物（会话内生成）。build.mjs 读它 → 配音+出图+manifest。改这里即改内容。

beats.action: lying in bed, eyes half-closed, looks weak

shots.content: The chubby mom with bun hair and orange top lying in bed, looking pale and unwell, eyes drooping, tucked gently under a blanket; a cozy simple bedroom in soft quiet morning light, just a few loose pencil lines for a bed edge and small window.

captions.zh: 那天早上，妈妈突然生病，躺在床上起不来。
captions.pinyin: nà tiān zǎoshang, māma tūrán shēngbìng, tǎng zài chuáng shang qǐ bù lái.
captions.local: Sáng hôm đó, mẹ bỗng ốm, nằm mãi trên giường không dậy được.

beats.emotion: focused and caring, a little nervous
beats.action: stirring a pot carefully with both hands, tongue slightly out in concentration

shots.content: The chubby boy with short golden-brown hair in green t-shirt and blue shorts, standing at a stove carefully stirring a small pot of congee with a wooden spoon, tongue slightly out in concentration, warm steam rising; a very minimal kitchen, only a faint pencil line for the stove edge.

captions.zh: 哥哥偷偷学着，给妈妈熬了一碗粥。
captions.pinyin: gēge tōutōu xuézhe, gěi māma áo le yī wǎn zhōu.
captions.local: Anh trai lén học cách nấu một bát cháo dâng mẹ.

beats.action: crouching to pick small wildflowers, holding a little bunch carefully

shots.content: The chubby girl with two small pigtails in a pink dress crouching in a garden patch, gently holding a small bunch of tiny wildflowers she just picked, expression soft and loving; a very minimal garden, only a few loose pencil grass tufts around her feet.

captions.zh: 妹妹摘了院子里的小野花，放在妈妈枕边。
captions.pinyin: mèimei zhāi le yuànzi lǐ de xiǎo yěhuā, fàng zài māma zhěn biān.
captions.local: Em gái hái những bông hoa dại ngoài vườn, đặt nhẹ bên gối mẹ.

beats.emotion: dad devoted and gentle; mom resting quietly
beats.action: dad sitting beside the bed, hand gently on mom's hand, watching over her

shots.content: The dad with short dark hair in a blue shirt sitting close beside the bed, one hand gently resting on the chubby mom's hand, his expression quiet and devoted; mom with bun hair and orange top is resting under a blanket; a very minimal bedroom, just faint pencil lines for bed and window.

captions.zh: 爸爸请了假，守在妈妈身旁，一刻也不离开。
captions.pinyin: bàba qǐng le jià, shǒu zài māma shēn páng, yī kè yě bù lí kāi.
captions.local: Bố xin nghỉ phép, ở bên mẹ cả ngày, không rời nửa bước.

beats.emotion: mom resting warmly; dog quiet and loyal beside her
beats.action: mom resting in bed, dog lying quietly on the floor right beside the bed looking up at mom

shots.content: The chubby mom with bun hair and orange top resting in bed under a blanket, and the cute grey-and-white round puppy lying quietly on the floor right beside the bed, chin on its paws, looking up at mom with sweet loyal eyes; a very minimal cozy bedroom, just a few faint pencil lines for bed and wall.

captions.zh: 连小狗也安静地趴在床边，陪着妈妈。
captions.pinyin: lián xiǎo gǒu yě ānjìng de pā zài chuáng biān, péizhe māma.
captions.local: Đến chú cún cũng nằm im bên giường, quấn quýt bên mẹ.

beats.emotion: mom deeply touched with teary eyes; family warm and loving around her
beats.action: mom sitting up in bed, dad, boy and girl gathered closely around her bedside, all smiling warmly at her

shots.content: The chubby mom with bun hair and orange top sitting up in bed, eyes glistening with grateful tears, one hand on her chest; the dad in blue shirt, the chubby boy in green t-shirt, and the chubby girl in pink dress are all gathered warmly around the bedside, smiling at mom with love; a cozy minimal bedroom, just faint pencil lines for bed and wall.

captions.zh: 妈妈看着这一家人，眼眶红了。
captions.pinyin: māma kànzhe zhè yījiārén, yǎnkuàng hóng le.
captions.local: Mẹ nhìn cả nhà, khóe mắt đỏ hoe.

beats.action: whole family gathered around mom, smiling warmly

shots.content: The whole family warmly gathered together — the dad in blue shirt, the chubby mom in orange top, the chubby boy in green t-shirt, the chubby girl in pink dress, and the little grey-and-white puppy at their feet — all close together with gentle loving smiles; a very minimal cozy room, mostly bare off-white paper.

captions.zh: 原来，最好的药，是家人的爱。
captions.pinyin: yuánlái, zuì hǎo de yào, shì jiārén de ài.
captions.local: Hóa ra, liều thuốc hay nhất, chính là tình yêu gia đình.
